title: IIT Delhi – Faculty

basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Professor, Associate Professor and Professor Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Recruitment 2026 for posts of Faculty. The online application opens on 17-04-2026, and closes on 30-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT Delhi website, home.iitd.ac.in/.

age_limit.age_details: Preferably below 35 years for Assistant Professor (Grade I/II)

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent in the preceding degree + Relevant Experience

how_to_apply: Eligible candidates must submit applications through the online portal.
seo_tags: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi Faculty Recruitment 2026
